education.school: Sir Syed University of Engineering and Technology (SSUET), Karachi
education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering

projects.name: Hand Gesture Controlled RC Car
projects.description: Implemented real-time gesture recognition using webcam and OpenCV to control an RC car. Integrated Arduino with HC-05 Bluetooth for motor control, enabling responsive, hands-free navigation. Tools: Python, OpenCV, Arduino, HC-05.

projects.name: Automated Solar Panel Cleaning System
projects.description: Built an Arduino-based system to auto-clean panels and rotate toward sunlight using LDR sensors. Integrated ESP32 with Firebase for remote monitoring and automated cleaning triggers, improving panel efficiency and uptime.

projects.name: Weather Prediction System (AI & IoT)
projects.description: Collected real-time sensor data (ESP32 + DHT11 → Firebase) and trained forecasting models using Facebook Prophet. Tuned changepoint parameters and normalized inputs to reduce drift, improving forecast accuracy by 15% over baseline.
